title: codereview: forward_mesh_to_upstream will need real monotonic time for handle_frame_rpl
description: Calling handle_frame_rpl with hardcoded 0 for now_ms will break neighbor ETX/last_seen and trickle timing in process_dio. Need to thread through a proper clock (Instant or SystemTime). P1 correctness for routing state. discovered-from:project-LICHEN-3k6w.2
close_reason: threaded monotonic Instant::elapsed().as_millis() as u32 to handle_frame_rpl via updated forward_mesh_to_upstream/mesh_to_upstream + Gateway now uses RplNode::new_root; 4 test calls updated; cargo test -p lichen-gateway passed all 41 tests; 3 codereview passes completed with related beads filed for DAO event handling, rssi=0, route integration
